## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to discuss progress and blockers across multiple client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several accounts (Engine, Town, GetPod) need focused effort on calibration and strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New approach for content voice/style calibration demonstrated using AI tools and author research](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Team facing some technical blockers (e.g. Augment) and content processing challenges (e.g. Hypergrowth)](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Upcoming director onsite next week may impact Marcel's availability](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Topics

### Client Account Updates

#### Engine

  - [Awaiting response from James (interim CMO) on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [If no response by end of day, Marcel will follow up directly](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Team should grab calendar time for future meetings upfront to avoid delays](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

#### Town

  - [Key risk: Figuring out content publishing approach given their website transition](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

#### GetPod

  - [Call scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Goal is to impress and demonstrate value of work done so far](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Need to show CFO concrete outputs for $18k spent to date](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Will demo GrowthX systems to showcase capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

#### Biologica

  - [Meeting tomorrow with Maggie (doctor on their team)](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Focus on getting deep product insights and differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

#### Hypergrowth

  - [Received content from Julia, but processing long video recordings is challenging](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Suggested using DeepGram for efficient transcription](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

#### Airbyte

  - [Preparing for kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Need to simplify and refine question template based on learnings from other accounts](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

#### Interwell

  - [Feedback call was challenging - client unhappy with traffic loss to AI answers](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Need to deliver on programmatic content promises](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Aiming for accelerated 4-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

### Content Calibration Process

  - [Marcel demonstrated new approach using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to:](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
    1.  Research relevant authors/voices
    2.  Analyze writing styles
    3.  Create spectrums of style attributes
    4.  Adapt to client's specific needs
  - [Goal is to create a "mood board" for content style that clients can easily provide input on](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Augment team blocked on some technical improvements this week](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Dave offered to help with web scraping needs using Screaming Frog](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Exploring options like DeepGram for efficient video transcription](https://fathom.video/share/m-6YVtFeQGvsyb2sHxyHsqm63mrRv1ca?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
